intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into session. 75%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Starting strong. 2 reps to go. The first one sets your standard for the rest.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1: 110% for 5:00. Breathing will be labored by minute 2. That's normal.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First rep is always the hardest mentally. Once you're in it, commit fully. 2 intervals ahead.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting fresh. Your body thinks this is fun. We'll check back in 5:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First interval: 5:00 at 110-110%. Settle in, don't overcook it.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/2. 55% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 5:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last threshold block. 105% FTP. One more step toward crushing your old FTP. Worth it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last block. 95-105% FTP, 75-85 rpm. After this: 10min cooldown.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last threshold block. Then 10min easy. Make this one count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final block! 20:00 at 105%. The light at the end of the tunnel. It's probably more threshold work.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last threshold interval. 105% FTP, 75-85 rpm. Finish what you started.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 80% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 80% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 80% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 80% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 80% into session. 60%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.
